name: Item-custom_is_non_procurable
label: Is Non-Procurable
description: Tick for items like Design & Engineering that are not procured via MR (used in Phase 14 MR generation filter)

name: Item-custom_default_wastage_percent
label: Default Wastage %
description: Auto-filled on Estimate Scope material rows via fetch_from. Adjust per item type (e.g. 5% for rebar, 10% for lumber).
